name: block-dangerous-bash
description: Block dangerous bash commands (destructive deletes, force push, DROP TABLE, kill, chmod 777)

hook.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [ -n "$CMD" ] && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-[rf]{1,2}\s+/|rm\s+-rf|DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE|SCHEMA)|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)|git\s+reset\s+--hard|pkill|kill\s+-9|chmod\s+777|mkfs\.|dd\s+if=.*of=/dev/)'; then echo "BLOCK: Dangerous command detected — confirm with user before running: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi

name: check-secrets
description: Block writing files that contain hardcoded secrets, API keys, or private keys

hook.command: INPUT=$(cat); CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.tool_input.new_string // "") + (.tool_input.content // "")'); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36,}|ghs_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36,}|-----BEGIN (RSA|EC|DSA|OPENSSH) PRIVATE KEY|AIza[0-9A-Za-z-_]{35}|xox[baprs]-[0-9A-Za-z]{10,})'; then echo "BLOCK: Potential hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables instead." >&2; exit 2; fi
